caption: The video features a man sitting in front of a microphone, likely recording a podcast or an interview. He is wearing a green cap, headphones, and a t-shirt with bold text that reads "I ON NEVER DO SHIT." The setting appears to be a casual, personal space, possibly a home studio or a small office, as indicated by the framed photographs on the wall behind him and the clothing racks visible in the background. The man seems engaged in conversation, speaking into the microphone with a relaxed demeanor. The environment suggests a laid-back yet professional atmosphere, with various items like a mannequin dressed in a white shirt and a desk with chairs adding to the scene's informal yet organized feel. The logo in the corner indicates that this is part of the "Boss Talk 101" podcast series.
